journey-onboard.evidence: Landing page shows a clear 'Start creating your world' button visible without scrolling alongside a heading and description.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js canvas renders with grid toggle active and an object picker sidebar listing 12 shapes (Cube, Sphere, Cylinder, Cone, Tree, House, Character, Animal, Rock, Flower, Cloud, Star).

journey-ai.evidence: Spark AI companion panel opens with chat log, text input accepted 'help me', and returned a non-empty response ('Who would you invite to come visit this place?').

journey-save.evidence: Save button triggered 'Saved!' status message and after full page reload the world title 'My World' and builder state persisted at the same URL.

journey-gallery.evidence: The /gallery route renders a gallery UI with heading, description, and an empty-state message with a 'Build Something' call-to-action button.
